_meta.channel_decomposition_family: {mcp_only,pirag_only}_vs_no_context on ARI, 5 scenarios (2 contrasts x 5 = 10 tests)

ari.design_tax_note: d_z denominator is within-pair SD; for paired baselines the arms share ablation_seed for Sources 1-5, so within-pair SD is dominated by Source 8 (per-(mode, seed) policy temperature, sigma=0.25). Report cohens_d_pooled as the design-independent effect size.
